settings.headline: A solo operator. A 5-node cluster. No VC, no PR, no BS.
settings.body:
Evotech is built solo, in 2–3 hours a day, on a Tailscale mesh of Dell Precision workstations in Perth.

The advantage isn't a bigger team — it's a **60+ API key pool** spread across Claude, GPT, and Gemini with automatic failover, and a **sovereign AU cluster** so your tokens never cross the Pacific.

Shopify handles billing. GST is included. Support emails get a reply within a business day, from me personally.

— *MANOJ, Founder*

settings.lede:

settings.question: What is Evolve AI Engine?
settings.answer: Evolve AI Engine is Evotech's flagship multi-model API orchestrator. Send one request — we route to the best-available model across Claude, GPT-4o, and Gemini, handle rate-limiting, failover, and token metering. Live at evolve.evotech.au.

settings.question: Is my data stored in Australia?
settings.answer: Yes. Every node in the Evotech cluster runs inside Australia (Perth, WA) via a Tailscale mesh. Your prompts are routed through AU servers; we never forward payloads to non-AU infrastructure except for the API calls to the model providers themselves.

settings.question: Why pay Evotech instead of buying Claude/OpenAI keys directly?
settings.answer: Three reasons: (1) one AUD invoice with GST handled — no USD currency fees or BAS headaches; (2) no quota management — when Claude is rate-limited, we auto-failover to GPT or Gemini; (3) no lock-in — switch models by changing one parameter, not rewriting your integration.

settings.question: How fast do I get my API key?
settings.answer: Within 60 seconds of your Shopify checkout completing. The provisioning webhook auto-generates the key and emails it to you with a getting-started guide.

settings.question: Can I cancel any time?
settings.answer: Yes. Every subscription is managed through the Shopify customer portal. Cancel, upgrade, downgrade, or pause — no phone calls, no retention scripts.

settings.question: Is there a founding-member discount?
settings.answer: Yes — 40% off for life for the first 20 paying customers across any plan. Starter becomes A$17/mo, Pro becomes A$47/mo, Business becomes A$119/mo. Once 20 slots are taken, the discount is gone forever.

settings.headline: One API key. Every model. *Paid in AUD.*
settings.lede: Skip the currency conversion, the quota juggling, and the BAS gymnastics. Get an Evotech key in 60 seconds.
